Name: Strategic clarity in six weeks
Quote: Meridian gave us the strategic clarity we'd been missing for 18 months — in six weeks. They asked better questions than any consultant we'd worked with before, and the output was something we actually used.

Name: Saved us from a bad fundraising round
Quote: Their financial modelling saved us from a fundraising round that would have diluted us badly. The revised model changed how every investor in the room responded to our unit economics slide.

Name: Practical and commercially minded
Quote: Practical, direct, and commercially minded. No fluff, no 200-slide deck. They found the three things that mattered and helped us fix them. We've seen the results in our P&L.

Name: The AI pilot exceeded expectations
Quote: We were sceptical about AI making a real difference in a law firm. The pilot Meridian designed changed our minds. Six hours a week back per fee-earner is real money.
